# Orleans.FSharp (Full Context)

Project homepage: https://neftedollar.com/orleans-fsharp/
Project repository: https://github.com/Neftedollar/orleans-fsharp
Primary language: F#
Runtime target: .NET 10 and Microsoft Orleans 10 parity
License: MIT

## Summary
Orleans.FSharp provides an idiomatic F# developer surface over Microsoft Orleans.
It emphasizes computation-expression based authoring (`grain {}`, `siloConfig {}`, `clientConfig {}`, `eventSourcedGrain {}`),
immutable state transitions, typed message flows, and reduced C# boilerplate.

## Key Claims
- Orleans 10 parity
- 1500+ tests (unit and integration)
- Support for serialization, streaming, event sourcing, reentrancy, placement, transactions, TLS/mTLS, health checks, OpenTelemetry, and Kubernetes clustering

1. Getting Started: https://neftedollar.com/orleans-fsharp/getting-started/
